name: Blackberry Grunt
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
1. Combine 1 cup Flour, 1 1/2 teaspoons Baking Powder, and Salt.
2. Cut in 3 tablespoons Cold Butter using a pastry blender or fingertips until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Stir together lightly beaten Egg and 1 tablespoon Milk if necessary to form a soft dough.
4. Roll out dough on a floured surface to about 1/2-inch thick.
5. Stamp out circles of dough with a biscuit cutter.
6. Cover berries with dough circles.
7. Brush the surface of the dough with a glaze made from 1 Egg yolk and remaining Milk.
8. Bake, uncovered, in preheated oven at 375°F for 25 minutes until nicely browned.
9. Serve hot or at room temperature with a small scoop of Creme Fraiche, Whipped Cream, or Ice Cream.
